name: Entra ID Stale Active Accounts (365 days)
description: Detects active Entra ID accounts with no login activity for at least 365 days.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.display_name AS account_name, u.last_sign_in_datetime AS last_login FROM entra_users u WHERE COALESCE(u.account_enabled, true) = true AND (u.last_sign_in_datetime IS NULL OR u.last_sign_in_datetime < NOW() - INTERVAL '365 days')
remediation: Disable long-dormant accounts and require formal approval before any reactivation.
